title: 16. Lyrics Window: Print
original_text: We moved the Lyrics window another step forward: it can print now. In [app.py]..., I added a `Print` button that sends the currently filtered text through Qt’s standard print dialog... Tests in [test_app_playlist.py]... now cover: accepted print flow... cancelled print dialog... I updated [Roadmap.md]... and refreshed the user guides... Verification is clean: ... 142 tests OK...
expected_subject: feat(ui): add print support to Lyrics window
expected_body_lines: - Add Print button using Qt standard print dialog for filtered text
- Emit textPrinted signal for status bar confirmation on success
- Update user guides (EN/ES) with new printing documentation
- Add tests for accepted/cancelled print flows and feedback
- Update Roadmap.md to mark print lyrics item complete
- Validation: compileall OK, 142 tests pass, offscreen verified
expected_command:
git commit -m "feat(ui): add print support to Lyrics window" \
  -m "- Add Print button using Qt standard print dialog for filtered text" \
  -m "- Emit textPrinted signal for status bar confirmation on success" \
  -m "- Update user guides (EN/ES) with new printing documentation" \
  -m "- Add tests for accepted/cancelled print flows and feedback" \
  -m "- Update Roadmap.md to mark print lyrics item complete" \
  -m "- Validation: compileall OK, 142 tests pass, offscreen verified"
